seo_description: Usa la Calculadora de Potencias y Exponentes gratis para obtener resultados exactos en segundos. Solo introduce tus valores, sin registro.
example_label: Calculate 3.5 raised to the 4th power for exponential growth calculations

range_hints.exponente: Small powers: 2-10; Large: 10-100; Avoid very large to prevent overflow

result_context: The resultado ({resultado}) is the base multiplied by itself exponent times, representing exponential growth or repeated multiplication.
formula_display: Result = Base ^ Exponente = Base × Base × ... (Exponente times)
mistakes: Multiplying base by exponent instead of repeated multiplication
Not understanding that exponent 0 always equals 1 (for non-zero base)
